# Scenario: approval-prompt-shell-git
# Preconditions: session ses_01HXYZABCDEF01 turn 3 in standard mode; worker requested tool=shell argument="git push origin main".
# No existing allow rule in agent profile "standard" matches.
# Dialog queue: a single PromptRequest { kind: "approval", payload: { tool, argument } }
# frame.mode switches from "prompt" -> "transcript" while the overlay is active.
# Copy MUST match Phase 4 "Approval Prompt UX" (OpenCode once/always/deny triple, plus [4] inspect).
# Prompt appears in full between rulers.

\e[36m\e[1mBakudo\e[0m  \e[1mstandard\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01 / turn 3\e[0m  \e[2mrepo bakudo-abox\e[0m

\e[1mYou:\e[0m push the branch and open a PR
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Planning turn 3 on the host.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker requested permission.

\e[33m──────── approval required ────────\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker wants to run: \e[1mshell(git push origin main)\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m This matches no existing allow rule in \e[1magent=standard\e[0m.

  [1] allow once
  [2] allow always for \e[1mshell(git push:*)\e[0m
  [3] deny
  [4] show context (inspect attempt spec)

Choice [1/2/3/4]:
\e[33m────────────────────────────────────\e[0m
